description: The Kyushu Seido-kai was a yakuza organization based in Fukuoka Prefecture, Japan, formed in 2006 as a splinter group from the Dojin-kai. It engaged in armed conflicts with its former parent syndicate, using automatic firearms and grenades, and was designated as a yakuza group in 2008. The group was involved in drug trafficking and loansharking, and dissolved in June 2013, later reorganizing under new names.
